fields.name: LOCATION-CODE
fields.description: The CACS Location that the account ; combined with the ACCT-NUM - this is the Key.

fields.name: ACCT-NUM
fields.description: The identifier for the account (account number).

fields.name: CREDIT-LIMIT-AMT
fields.description: The Credit Limit on the account.

fields.name: EXPIRATION-DATE
fields.description: The date the account expires.

fields.name: BALANCE-AMT
fields.description: Total Balance of the account. Used throughout the system in displays and reports, interface files, etc.

fields.name: OVERLIMIT-AMT
fields.description: Amount the account is over its limit. This amount is added to TOTAL-DELINQ-AMT for tracking of Third Party assigned amount when placed at an agency.

fields.name: DISPUTED-AMT
fields.description: Amount that is in dispute. Must be less than the

fields.name: TOTAL-DUE-AMT
fields.description: The total amount that is due.

fields.name: CURRENT-DUE-AMT
fields.description: The current due amount.

fields.name: COLL-ASGN-UD-1
fields.description: First user-defined field used for Collector Assignment.

fields.name: COLL-ASGN-UD-TYPE1
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: COLL-ASGN-UD-FMT-1
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: COLL-ASGN-UD-2
fields.description: Second user-defined field used for Collector Assignment.

fields.name: COLL-ASGN-UD-TYPE2
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: COLL-ASGN-UD-FMT-2
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: TOTAL-DELINQ-AMT
fields.description: The total amount that is delinquent.

fields.name: CYCLES-DELINQ-CNT
fields.description: Number of cycles the account is delinquent.

fields.name: DAYS-DELINQ-CNT
fields.description: The number of days the account is delinquent.

fields.name: LAST-PAYMENT-AMT
fields.description: The amount of the last payment.

fields.name: CHARGE-OFF-DATE
fields.description: The date that the account was charged off.

fields.name: DLQ-DAYS-CHRG-OFF
fields.description: Number of days the account was Delinquent when it was charged off.

fields.name: LST-PART-COF-AMT
fields.description: Last Partial Charge-Off amount.

fields.name: LST-PART-COF-DATE
fields.description: Last Partial Charge-Off date.

fields.name: TOT-PART-COF-AMT
fields.description: Total Partial Charge-Off amount.

fields.name: BAL-PART-COF-AMT
fields.description: Balance Amount plus Total Partial Charge-Off Amount.

fields.name: PART-COF-ACCT-NUM
fields.description: The account number that is used to track the partial charge-off amount.

fields.name: USER-DEFINED-7
fields.description: User-defined value that will be recorded on the collection history entry saved on the database, and displayed on the right end of each History entry under USER-DEFINED-6 on the History tab. As an example, this field may be populated with balance amount, and for each online and batch history entry recorded, the USER-DEFINED-7 is saved. When the history is viewed, the changes in the delinquent amount over time can be seen.

fields.name: ACCT-OPEN-DATE
fields.description: The date the account was opened.

fields.name: NEXT-DUE-DATE
fields.description: The date that the next payment is due on the account.

fields.name: INTEREST-RATE
fields.description: The Annual Percentage Rate (APR) on the account.

fields.name: OTH-DELINQ-AMT
fields.description: Delinquent amount that is not principal or interest.

fields.name: REPO-CHARGES
fields.description: The amount of the charges for the repossession activities.

fields.name: REPOSSESSION-DATE
fields.description: Date the collateral was repossessed.

fields.name: MATURITY-DATE
fields.description: Due date of the final payment on the account.

fields.name: PAYMENT-AMT
fields.description: The payment amount on the account.

fields.name: PRINCIPAL-DELQ-AMT
fields.description: The amount of Principal that is delinquent.

fields.name: INTEREST-DELQ-AMT
fields.description: The amount of Interest that is delinquent.

fields.name: USER-DEF-SEARCH-1
fields.description: The first User Defined Search field used for Name Search.

fields.name: UD-SEARCH-1-TYPE
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: UD-SEARCH-1-FMT
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: USER-DEF-SEARCH-2
fields.description: The second User Defined Search field used for Name Search.

fields.name: UD-SEARCH-2-TYPE
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: UD-SEARCH-2-FMT
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: ACCT-NUM-SORT
fields.description: This field is used to contain up to 7 digits from the account number, e.g., the digits that may indicate a specific product, or unique account number components.

fields.name: CYCLE-ID
fields.description:
The ID of the Cycle that the account is assigned to for billing purposes (usually for revolving products). For loans, the Cycle ID is typically set to the payment due date.
When an account enters CACS, this field is copied from the Financial-Extract to the Account table.

fields.name: UD-DATE-FIELD-1
fields.description: User defined date field.

fields.name: LAST-BILLING-DATE
fields.description: The date that the account was last billed.

fields.name: AGED-HISTORY
fields.description: This represents the history of delinquency status for the past 12 months.For Recovery Accounting populates with the Metro2 Payment History for most recent 12 months.

fields.name: CREDIT-LIMIT-DATE
fields.description: The date that the credit limit was established or updated.

fields.name: INT-LATE-CHG-AMT
fields.description: The amount of interest and late charges on the account.

fields.name: DELINQ-AMT-AGE-1
fields.description: Amount that is delinquent 30 days.

fields.name: DELINQ-AMT-AGE-2
fields.description: Amount that is delinquent 60 days.

fields.name: DELINQ-AMT-AGE-3
fields.description: Amount that is delinquent 90 days.

fields.name: DELINQ-AMT-AGE-4
fields.description: Amount that is delinquent 120 days.

fields.name: NUMBER-OF-CARDS
fields.description: Number of credit cards that are currently active on the account.

fields.name: WARN-BULLETIN-DATE
fields.description: Date of the Warning Bulletin that the account is included.

fields.name: WARN-BULLETIN-ZONE
fields.description: Zone of Warning Bulletin on which the account is included.

fields.name: OTHER-ACCT-NUM
fields.description: Other Account Number associated with the Primary accountholder.

fields.name: CREDIT-SCORE
fields.description: The Credit Score derived during originations processing of the credit application. This may also be the current credit score.

fields.name: BEHAVIOR-INDEX
fields.description: Behavior Index (score) for the accountholder.

fields.name: LAST-PAYMENT-DATE
fields.description: Date of the last payment. For overdraft accounts, date of last deposit.

fields.name: LAST-MONETARY-AMT
fields.description: Amount of the last monetary transaction.

fields.name: LAST-MONETARY-DATE
fields.description: Date of the last monetary transaction.

fields.name: LAST-MONETARY-TYPE
fields.description: Transaction Type for the last monetary transaction.

fields.name: CHARGE-OFF-AMT
fields.description: Amount of principal charged-off.

fields.name: SORT-VALUE-1
fields.description: First User-defined field used for Work List Sort criteria.

fields.name: SORT-VALUE-1-TYPE
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: SORT-VALUE-1-FMT
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: SORT-VALUE-2
fields.description: Second User-defined field used for Work List Sort criteria.

fields.name: SORT-VALUE-2-TYPE
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: SORT-VALUE-2-FMT
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.description: Free format user-defined area used for installation specific data.

fields.name: UD-1-TYPE
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: UD-1-FMT
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.description: Free format user-defined area used for installation specific data.

fields.name: UD-2-TYPE
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: UD-2-FMT
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.description: Free format user-defined area used for installation specific data.

fields.name: UD-3-FMT
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: USER-DEFINED-4
fields.description: Free format user-defined area used for installation specific data.

fields.name: UD-4-FMT
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: USER-DEFINED-5
fields.description: Free format user-defined area used for installation specific data.

fields.name: UD-5-TYPE
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: UD-5-FMT
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: USER-DEFINED-6
fields.description: The label field for the User-Defined-7 field included on each collections entry. This field is different than the User-Defined-7 in that it is not stored in the collections history database when an activity is recorded.Free format user-defined area used for installation specific data; but should sync up with the User-Defined-7 field.

fields.name: UD-6-TYPE
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: UD-6-FMT
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: USER-DEFINED-8-1
fields.description: Free format user-defined area used for installation specific data.

fields.name: USER-DEFINED-8-2
fields.description: Free format user-defined area used for installation specific data.

fields.name: USER-DEFINED-8-3
fields.description: Free format user-defined area used for installation specific data.

fields.name: USER-DEFINED-8-4
fields.description: Free format user-defined area used for installation specific data.

fields.name: USER-DEFINED-8-5
fields.description: Free format user-defined area used for installation specific data.

fields.name: UD-8-1-TYPE
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: UD-8-2-TYPE
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: UD-8-4-FMT

fields.name: UD-8-5-FMT
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: PRINCIPAL-AMT
fields.description: Principal amount owed on the account.

fields.name: OTHER-AMT
fields.description: Other amount owed on the account.Recovery Accounting populates with the sum of costs on the account that are included in the payoff.

fields.name: ORIG-BALANCE-AMT
fields.description: Original amount of the loan.

fields.name: OFFICER-NUM
fields.description: Financial institution officer ID or User ID that approved the loan/account. May also be used for Current Officer.

fields.name: BRANCH-NUM
fields.description: Financial institution 'branch number' where the loan was processed.

fields.name: ORIGINAL-TERM
fields.description: Original Term (months) for the loan.

fields.name: ORIG-INTEREST-RATE
fields.description: Original interest rate on the account.

fields.name: DEALER-NUM
fields.description: The identifier of the dealer that initiated origination of the loan, e.g., car dealer.

fields.name: PAYMENT-FREQUENCY
fields.description: Frequency of payment on the loan.

fields.name: REFINANCE-DATE
fields.description: Date the loan was refinanced.

fields.name: DEPOSIT-IND
fields.description: Used to indicate if there is a deposit on the account. This is usually applicable to utility accounts.

fields.name: ON-BUDGET-IND
fields.description: Used to indicate if the customer is on a Budget Assistance Plan.

fields.name: DPA-IND
fields.description: Used to indicate if there is a Deferred Payment Arrangement set up on the account.

fields.name: CUT-OFF-DATE
fields.description: Date service was cut off.

fields.name: CUT-OFF-CODE
fields.description: 3 byte code indicating why the service was cut off.

fields.name: ACCOUNT-TYPE
fields.description:
Specifies type of account.
Used to populate database key for Third Party Vintage reporting.

fields.name: SERVICE-TYPE
fields.description: Specifies type of service.

fields.name: BUDGET-PAYMENT-AMT
fields.description: The Budget Payment amount set up for the customer.

fields.name: TERMINATE-AMT
fields.description: The amount the customer must pay to avoid termination of service.

fields.name: TERMINATE-EXP-DATE
fields.description: The date the service will be terminated if the TERMINATE-AMT is not paid.

fields.name: SAT-USER-DEFINED-1
fields.description: First user-defined value for Transaction/State assignment processing.

fields.name: SAT-UD-1-TYPE
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: SAT-UD-1-FMT
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: SAT-USER-DEFINED-2
fields.description: First user-defined value for Transaction/State assignment processing.

fields.name: SAT-UD-2-TYPE
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.name: SAT-UD-2-FMT
fields.description: Not used in baseline processing; available as an element.

fields.description: User-defined value that can be used in letters or other functions.

fields.name: BANK-NUM
fields.description: The Bank Number assigned to the account in the accounting system.

fields.name: APP-CODE
fields.description: The Application Code assigned to the account in the accounting system.

fields.name: ESTIMATED-MNTH-PAY
fields.description: The expected amount the account/customer will have on the next bill.

fields.name: ACI-INDICATOR
fields.description: Used by Strata to determine the CCI value of the account, and to determine which Strata strategies should be used. If Strata is not being used, this should be set to spaces.

fields.name: SERVICING-SYSTEM
fields.description: Identifier of Servicing System used by Strata.

fields.name: NATL-CURRENCY
fields.description: The National Currency for the account.

fields.name: BASE-CURRENCY
fields.description: Currency that all values on the Financial Extract are stored. All accounts in the same Location must have the same BASE-CURRENCY; this must match the currency value on the Location table.

fields.name: VALUE-CODE
fields.description: User-defined value rating.

fields.name: RISK-CODE
fields.description: User-defined risk level.

fields.name: RECOMMENDED-ACT-CD
fields.description: User-defined recommended action.

fields.name: ACTG-SYS-ID
fields.description: This field identifies the accounting system (system of record) that is the source of the data on this record.

fields.name: EXTERNAL-ACCT-NUM
fields.description: An alternate account number for this account.For Payment Card Industry (PCI) processing of Credit Card accounts, this field could be used to contain the actual credit card number, and the ACCT-NUM uses the identifier for the Account.

fields.name: ACCT-STAT-CODE-1
fields.description: The first Status Code for the account provided by the accounting system.If Recovery Accounting is used, this field is used for: Indicator for when account is in blocked status - no payments allowed or frozen status - no monetary transactions allowed.

fields.name: ACCT-STAT-CODE-2
fields.description: The second Status Code for the account provided by the accounting system.If Recovery Accounting is used, this field is used for: Indicator for accounts accrual status - hard stop (no accruals) or memo stop (accrues into while-in-stop buckets).Values impact function of CACS Payoff Calculator.

fields.name: ACCT-STAT-CODE-3
fields.description: The third Status Code for the account provided by the accounting system.If Recovery Accounting is used, this field is used for: Foreclosure Status

fields.name: ACCT-STAT-CODE-4
fields.description: The fourth Status Code for the account provided by the accounting system.If Recovery Accounting is used, this field is used for: Repossession / Voluntary Surrender Status

fields.name: ACCT-STAT-CODE-5
fields.description: The fifth Status Code for the account provided by the accounting system.

fields.name: ACCT-STAT-CODE-6
fields.description: The sixth Status Code for the account provided by the accounting system.

fields.name: ACCT-STAT-CODE-7
fields.description: The seventh Status Code for the account provided by the accounting system.

fields.name: ACCT-STAT-CODE-8
fields.description: The eighth Status Code for the account provided by the accounting system.

fields.name: ACCT-STAT-CODE-9
fields.description: The ninth Status Code for the account provided by the accounting system.

fields.name: ACCT-STAT-CODE-10
fields.description: The tenth Status Code for the account provided by the accounting system.

fields.name: LGL-STATUS
fields.description: Legal Status code assigned to the account - valid values are controlled via reference table

fields.name: REC-INT-MTD-AMT
fields.description: Post charge-off accrued interest recovered month-to-date

fields.name: REC-PRIN-MTD-AMT
fields.description: Principal recovered month-to-date

fields.name: REC-TOT-COST-MTD
fields.description: Total recovery costs recovered month-to-date

fields.name: JGMT-EFFECT-DATE
fields.description: The judgment effective date from the most recent judgment record

fields.name: JGMT-INT-AMT
fields.description: The interest amount awarded in the most recent  judgment

fields.name: JGMT-PRIN-AMT
fields.description: The principal amount awarded in the most recent judgment

fields.name: JGMT-TOT-COST-AMT
fields.description: Additional balances/recovery costs awarded in the most recent judgment

fields.name: ADDL-JGMTS-IND
fields.description: Indicates if there is more than one judgment that has been posted to the account.

fields.name: REC-CODST-IN-BAL
fields.description: Sum of all recovery costs on the account where they are identified as 'included in payoff'.

fields.name: REC-COST-NOT-BAL
fields.description: Sum of all recovery costs on the account where they are identified as 'not included in payoff'.

fields.name: REC-COST-ASSES-MTD
fields.description: The sum of all recovery costs assessed month-to-date.

fields.name: REC-COST-WAIVE-MTD
fields.description: Not currently used by Recovery Accounting.

fields.name: REC-COST-CAPT-LTD
fields.description: Sum of all recovery costs capitalized (added to principal) since charge off.

fields.name: REC-COST-CAT-1
fields.description: The first Recovery Cost type defined in the Recovery Accounting Bank Control File.

fields.name: REC-COST-AMT-1
fields.description: The post charge-off recovery cost due balance amount associated with the first recovery cost.

fields.name: REC-COST-CAT-2
fields.description: The second Recovery Cost type defined in the Recovery Accounting Bank Control File.

fields.name: REC-COST-AMT-2
fields.description: The post charge-off recovery cost due balance amount associated with the second recovery cost.

fields.name: REC-COST-AMT-3

fields.name: REC-COST-AMT-11

fields.name: REC-COST-AMT-12
fields.description: The post charge-off recovery cost due balance amount associated with the twelfth recovery cost.

fields.name: REC-COST-CAT-13
fields.description: The first Recovery Cost type thirteenth in the Recovery Accounting Bank Control File.

fields.name: REC-COST-AMT-13

fields.name: REC-COST-AMT-14

fields.name: REC-COST-AMT-15

fields.name: REC-COST-CAT-16

fields.name: REC-COST-AMT-16

fields.name: REC-COST-CAT-17

fields.name: REC-COST-AMT-17
fields.description: The post charge-off recovery cost due balance amount associated with the seventeenth recovery cost.

fields.name: REC-COST-CAT-18

fields.name: REC-COST-AMT-18
fields.description: The post charge-off recovery cost due balance amount associated with the eighteenth recovery cost.

fields.name: REC-COST-CAT-19
fields.description: The nineteenth Recovery Cost type defined in the Recovery Accounting Bank Control File.

fields.name: REC-COST-AMT-19
fields.description: The post charge-off recovery cost due balance amount associated with the nineteenth recovery cost.

fields.name: REC-COST-CAT-20

fields.name: REC-COST-AMT-20
fields.description: The post charge-off recovery cost due balance amount associated with the twentieth recovery cost.

fields.name: LOAN-POOL-NUM
fields.description: The whole asset sales Pool Number that the account is assigned to for sales activity to an investor.

fields.name: LOAN-POOL-SLD-DATE
fields.description: The date that the account was sold to an investor as a part of a post charge-off pool of accounts.

fields.name: ORIG-PORTF-TYPE
fields.description: The original type of account when it was charged off.

fields.name: DAYS-SNC-CHRGOFF
fields.description: Number of days since charge-off.

fields.name: LAST-EXT-UPD-DATE
fields.description: The date that the Financial Extract was last updated.

fields.name: LEGAL-STATE
fields.description: The Legal State when state laws apply (used in Recovery Accounting).

fields.name: CHRG-OFF-DOWN-IND
fields.description: Charge-off / Charge Down Indicator - indicates if this is a full charge-off or part of a Charge Down and where it is in the process.

fields.name: INVESTOR-NUM
fields.description: The investor number associated with the whole asset sales Pool Number that the account is associated with.

fields.name: EXT-RAND-NUM
fields.description: Random number calculated as part of the interface that can be used as a criteria in rules to distribute accounts randomly, e.g., Collector Assignment.

fields.name: CMPL-CODE
fields.description: The Compliance Code assigned to this account to associate to a set of compliance rules in CACS if desired for client's Time Zone Assignment and/or Compliance Profile Assignment Rules.

fields.name: TCPA-EXEMPT
fields.description: Indicates if the account has been identified as TCPA exempt for compliance processing

fields.name: PRODUCT-TYPE
fields.description: The product type code used to display the Product type information in the Collector Action summary info.

fields.name: NEXT-BILL-DATE
fields.description: The next billing date.

fields.name: HMDA-ULI-CODE
fields.description: Sourced from the accounting system, this is a unique identifier for each individual loan that is covered by the HMDA ULI regulation, and will remain associated to the loan even when sold to another institution.
